zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze於1540年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆時，她的父親Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham31歲，母親Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham28歲。她於大約1547年與Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire在英國英格蘭奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1587年5月11日在英國維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲享年47歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze于1540年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆时，她的父亲Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham31岁，母亲Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham28岁。她于大约1547年与Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire在英国英格兰奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1587年5月11日在英国維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲享年47岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲。

nameMeanings.name: blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze was born in 1540, in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham, was 31 and her mother, Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham, was 28. She married Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire about 1547, in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 11 May 1587, in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze est née en 1540, à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire environ 1547, à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 mai 1587, à Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze 1540 in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham 31 und ihre Mutter Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham 28. Sie hat um 1547 in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Mai 1587 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze è nata il nel 1540 nel Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire circa 1547, nel Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 11 maggio 1587, nel Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogozeが1540年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムで生まれた時，父Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurhamは31歳，母Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurhamは28歳であった。約1547年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムでSir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1587年5月11日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアリディアルド トレゴズで47歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアリディアルド トレゴズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze(이)가 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에서 Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 5월 11일 영국 윌츠히르 리디아르드 트레고즈에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 리디아르드 트레고즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze nasceu em 1540, em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire aproximadamente 1547, em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de maio de 1587, em Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze родилась в 1540 г. в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire около 1547 г. в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 11 мая 1587 г. в местности лидярд трегоз, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности лидярд трегоз, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady elizabeth blount , lady lydiard- trogoze nació en 1540, en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas St john , lord lydiacd-tregoze, high sheriff of wiltshire aproximadamente 1547, en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1587, en Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
